content.en:
"I've seen the Frostless Lord......"

Ye Tian greeted one by one.

"The Endless Lord is amazing!" the Frostless Lord praised.

The other half-step Legendary Realm Lords also gave words of appreciation, and their words were full of surprise and incredulity.

After Ye Tian greeted the half-step Legendary Realm Lords, he looked at this level.

Being able to stop all the half-step Legendary Realm Lords, the difficulty of this level can be imagined how difficult it is.

I saw a river in front of many half-step Legendary Realm Lords, this was not a long river of gray mist, but a long river of time.

Ye Tian is no stranger to the long river of time, many worlds have long rivers of time, such as the countless heavens and earths in the source sea, and the world has a long river of time, and these long rivers of time are all tributaries of the long river of time in the source sea.

Like the creatures of the ordinary world, if they break free from the long river of time, they can live with heaven and earth.

For a legendary lord like Ye Tian, the long river of time is nothing, and he can even create countless long rivers of time with his hands.

However, the long river of time in the gray mist stone statue is not an ordinary river of time.

What exactly is the long river of time, Ye Tian has not entered, so he is not very clear.

"Lord Frostless, is there any mystery in this long river of time?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Frostless Lord said: "This river of time is a tributary of the long river of time in the Void Region, which was forcibly throttled by the Eternal Masters with the power of the great shore, placed here, and then transformed by the Eternal Masters...... Step by step, finally return to the ordinary, assimilated under the long river of time. The last time the Grey Mist Stone Statue was born, a Legendary Realm Lord came here, and he tried to cross the river of time, but in the end, he also failed. We have known about the existence of this river of time for a long time, but we have not been able to cross it so far, and it is said that a top Legendary Realm Lord has entered, but there are no rewards. Moreover, the Legendary Realm Lord has passed the previous levels, and the rewards are also very ordinary. The fate in the Gray Mist Stone Statue is also useful for the Legendary Lords and the Legendary Realm Lords who have just been promoted, and it is of little use to those powerful Legendary Realm Lords, so they naturally won't come in to fight. "

"I see. "

Ye Tian nodded slightly.

It is of no use to the powerful Legendary Realm Lords, those Legendary Realm Lords naturally don't need to come in, they just occupy the quota when they come in, and it is a waste of time, it is better for the Legendary Lords in their own forces to come in and break through.

This is also the reason why the Dragon Gu Lord did not come in.

"Only a powerful Legendary Realm Lord can cross this time!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Kuang You felt that he would definitely not be able to cross this long river of time, but this long river of time must be regarded as a chance.

Otherwise, these half-step Legendary Realm Lords wouldn't be here any longer

Sure enough.

In the following days, a half-step Legendary Realm Lord tried to enter this long river of time, and each time he didn't stay for a long time, and when his cultivation fell to the Transcendent Realm Legendary Lord, he would return and start to resume his cultivation.

Ye Tian also consulted these half-step Legendary Realm Lords, and they also revealed something.

In the long river of time, although time will be reversed, in this process, you can clearly understand the eternal power of time, which is helpful for the comprehension of other eternal paths, after all, many eternal paths are mixed with the rules of time.

The river of time here is the source of everything, if you are in the void area, you can't enter the river of time at all, and you can't perceive the existence of the river of time, and only here can you have such an opportunity.

And the half-step Legendary Realm lords don't care about those eternal paths, in fact, they have all comprehended a lot of the eternal paths of the Perfection Realm, and what they care about is to completely control time.

Once you have complete control over time, you can use the power of time to become a Legendary Realm Lord.

There are two ways to become a Legendary Lord, one is to completely control time, and the other is to completely control space.

Once time is mastered, a series of eternal paths related to time can transcend perfection and reach the legendary level, which is the so-called legendary eternal path.

At that time, it will be very powerful in the legendary realm.

But now in the Void Region, many new Legendary Realms did not control time or space, and they forcibly stepped into the Legendary Realm Lords with a Legendary-level Eternal Path

In the beginning, the Legendary Realm Lord who tried to cross the river of time did not have control over time, otherwise he would not have been able to cross the river of time.

"I haven't even comprehended the perfection of an eternal path, it's too far away from controlling the time, my gray mist eternal path has fallen into shackles, and I am at the peak of entry, maybe I can use this long river of time to comprehend the mystery of time, help it break the shackles, and promote to the realm of Xiaocheng. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he is also ready to enter the long river of time

Rumble!!!

As soon as he entered the long river of time, the time of this body was forcibly reversed, and even if Ye Tian resisted, he couldn't resist it.

He saw the scenes of the past, and almost even the other replica bodies were affected.

In desperation, he disconnected the connection between the replicating bodies so that he was not affected.

Time is going backwards, and Ye Tian's cultivation is also going backwards.

Legendary Lord of the Realm!

Legendary Lord of the Perfection Realm!

Legendary Lord of the Initial Realm!

When he was about to fall out of the Origin Realm Legendary Lord, Ye Tian forcibly rushed out of the long river of time.

At this moment, his cultivation of this replica body was really frozen in the Origin Realm Legendary Lord.

If it is other legendary lords, I am afraid that I will have to practice back step by step, although it only takes some time, but this time is not short, and Ye Tian does not need to cultivate slowly, he directly annihilates this copy body, and then (gets) can change to a copy body.

And so.

Ye Tian's replica body left here first, and then came back with a replica body.

The others were a little surprised to see Ye Tian recover his cultivation so quickly, but they knew that it was Ye Tian's secret, so no one asked.

In this way, Ye Tian cultivated in the long river of time almost all the time, constantly contemplating the mysteries of time.

Finally on this day, after a breakthrough in time, Ye Tian's Gray Mist Eternal Dao directly broke the shackles and was promoted to the realm of Xiaocheng.

At the same time, Ye Tian began to comprehend other Eternal Dao Ren.

Mixed Yuan Eternal Dao, Wansheng Eternal Dao seems to have little to do with time, but time and space extend all Eternal Dao, so he controls time more, plus that treasure map and many other opportunities, Ye Tian continues to make progress in Mixed Yuan Eternal Dao and Wansheng Eternal Dao.

These two Eternal Paths are about to be elevated to the realm of perfection. _
